summary.intent: Add AI-generated interaction overviews that summarize groups of session events (from SessionStart to Stop), display them in the UI, and fix markdown table rendering.
summary.outcome: InteractionOverview model added to Prisma schema, generateInteractionOverview function implemented with claude-haiku-4-5 AI summarization, backfill command run against 14 historical sessions, overview card shown in SessionDetail screen, and GFM table parsing/rendering added to MarkdownView.

repo: gossamer uses Prisma with SQLite; schema changes require `prisma db push` + `npm run build` before taking effect
Session event groups are bounded by SessionStart and Stop event types; Stop is the trigger point for generating overviews
The server (src/server.ts) is a long-running process and must be manually restarted after recompilation to serve updated endpoints
AI summarization uses claude-haiku-4-5 with a --no-summary flag fallback to truncated analysis when no API key is present
The Expo app has a custom MarkdownView component (app/src/components/MarkdownView.tsx) with a block-based parser that previously had no table support
Overview generation is fired non-blockingly on Stop events to avoid delaying the hook response

code.finding: New InteractionOverview model with id, sessionId (unique), summary, keywords (JSON text), startedAt, endedAt fields
generateInteractionOverview(db, sessionId, noSummary) fetches all events, builds a text digest, calls AI for summary+keywords, then upserts the InteractionOverview row
backfill-overviews subcommand groups all events by sessionId where event='Stop' and calls generateInteractionOverview for each
New GET /api/sessions/:id/overview endpoint returns { sessionId, summary, keywords[], startedAt, endedAt } or 404 if no overview exists

Added table block type to parseBlocks: detects GFM table by header row containing | followed by separator line (|---|---|), collects data rows; paragraph accumulator was incorrectly absorbing table lines due to overly broad | guard
Fetches overview in parallel with session + events; renders overview card between parent/child banners and event list with summary, keyword chips, and time range

workflow: Schema changes require both `prisma db push` and `npm run build` to propagate to the running application
Historical data can be backfilled with a dedicated subcommand rather than re-processing events live
Non-blocking fire-and-forget (void promise) is the right pattern for overview generation triggered inside a synchronous event handler
TypeScript type-checking the Expo app separately (`tsc --noEmit`) is a useful final verification step after edits

friction: User had to explicitly ask whether the server needed a restart — this gap in developer experience caused confusion
Port 3000 was still occupied by the old process, requiring a force-kill before the server could restart
The initial paragraph accumulator fix for table detection was too broad (any line with | broke paragraphs), requiring a second corrective edit to tighten the guard to actual table starts
open_items: InteractionOverview is not shown anywhere in the ActiveSessions list screen — could surface summary/keywords there as a preview
The keywords field is stored as JSON text in SQLite; no indexing or search capability exists on keywords yet
No error handling or retry logic if the AI call fails during live Stop-event processing (only the backfill path is re-runnable)
Table renderer uses fixed flex-proportioned columns with no column-width negotiation — complex tables with many columns may overflow
